articles.description:
Panda Express serves up new Crispy Sesame Shrimp & Beef as its latest seasonal entree starting October 8, 2025.

The new offering features tempura-battered shrimp, crispy-fried beef strips, green beans, and red bell peppers wok-tossed with a "savory, subtly spicy umami sauce." The shrimp is the same as from Panda Express' Honey Walnut Shrimp, while the beef comes from the chain's Beijing Beef.
According to Panda Express, Crispy Sesame Shrimp & Beef is "inspired by the classic Sichuan dish, Mouthwatering Chicken," which is poached chicken served cold with a chili oil sauce.
Also on October 8, Panda Express will be introducing its Wok Wednesdays promotion (as a play on Taco Tuesdays). Each Wednesday, the promotion offers a game that can be played through the Panda Express mobile app to unlock "reward offers" for use on the same day.
Photo via Panda Express.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Panda Express Launches New Crispy Sesame Shrimp & Beef

articles.description:
Eggo partners with Netflix's Stranger Things TV series to release new Eggo Stranger Things Strawberry Waffles, which are the brand's "first-ever strawberry red waffle with colors from natural sources."

The color of the waffles mirrors the color of the rifts from the series, and waffles are also a favorite of the character Eleven from the show.
The limited-time flavor arrives in time for Stranger Things' fifth and final season, which kicks off on November 26, 2025.
You can find 10-count boxes of Eggo Stranger Things Strawberry Waffles for a suggested price of $3.59 at select stores starting this month. Stranger Things Homestyle Waffles featuring a themed box also arrive in stores nationwide this month.
Eggo also makes regular Strawberry Waffles, but they're not red in color.
Photo via Eggo.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: New Limited-Edition Eggo Stranger Things Strawberry Waffles Arrive

articles.description:
Tuesday, October 7, 2025, is National Taco Day. Here are some deals and specials to celebrate:

- Del Taco - From October 7 through October 9, 2025, rewards members can get a free The Del Taco with a purchase of $10 or more.
- El Pollo Loco - Through October 7, 2025, rewards members can get three chicken tacos for $5. You can choose from Chicken Taco al Carbon, Shredded Chicken Crunchy Taco, and Chicken Avocado Tacos.
- Jack in the Box - On October 7, rewards members can get two free tacos with a $1 minimum order. 
- Laredo Taco Company - On October 7, 2025, the 7-Eleven taco shop is offering BOGO Lunch Tacos and 2 for $5 El Gran Tocino Breakfast Tacos.
- Moe's Southwest Grill - On October 7, Moe's is offering $2 tacos at participating locations.
- Taco Bell - The chain is putting out various drops throughout October 7, 2025, in its mobile app for its rewards members starting at 9AM PT. Here's what the schedule looks like:


9AM - 500 rewards members can win a National Taco Day T-shirt.
11AM - The first 25,000 rewards members get a $1 Cantina Chicken Soft Taco.
1PM - The first 25,000 rewards members get a $1 Cantina Chicken Soft Taco.
3PM - The first 25,000 rewards members get a $1 Cantina Chicken Soft Taco.
5PM - The first 25,000 rewards members get a $1 Cantina Chicken Soft Taco.
7PM - 100 rewards members can win a year of Taco Tuesdays (i.e., they get a $160 Taco Bell gift card).
There's also a "$5 off a Taco Party Pack" offer for October 7, 2025.


- Taco John's - On October 7, 2025, rewards members who check in at Taco John's get a free crispy beef taco on their next visit.
Photo via Taco Bell.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: 2025 National Taco Day Deals and Specials

articles.description:
KFC has brought back its Original Honey BBQ sauce and is making it available, for the first time, as a sauce option on its fried chicken, chicken sandwich, and chicken tenders, in addition to its wings.

KFC's Original Honey BBQ was first introduced in the late 1990s as a sweet and smoky flavor for its wings. It was discontinued in the early 2000s. The sauce is now back at participating locations nationwide, while supplies last.
On the money-saving side of things, KFC continues to offer its $3.99 Chicken Sandwich deal. The sandwich features an Extra Crispy chicken breast filet, pickles, and mayo or spicy sauce, on a toasted brioche bun.
Additionally, the fast-food chain teases a schedule of rewards member-exclusive deals for the 13 days leading up to Halloween this year. The upcoming deals revealed include: a free Classic Chicken Sandwich with a $10 purchase, 50% off 12 pieces of chicken, and 50 Nuggets for $20.
Photo via KFC.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: KFC Brings Back Honey BBQ Sauce

articles.description:
Crumbl introduces its new Biscoff Pie as part of this week's limited-time menu available from October 6 through October 11, 2025.

Here's the lineup you can expect to find at Crumbl bakeries nationwide this week:
- New Biscoff Pie - A Biscoff–infused cream cheese pie filling on a crunchy Biscoff crust, topped with a smooth Biscoff cookie butter spread, whipped cream, and a Biscoff cookie.
- Benson Boone's Moonbeam Ice Cream Cookie - A celebrity-themed product making a return, it features a chilled chocolate cookie packed with cookies & cream pieces, topped with moonbeam ice cream-inspired lemon, berry, and marshmallow toppings, a sweet white drizzle, and a sprinkle of cookies & cream.
- Blue Monster Cookie featuring Chips Ahoy! - A chilled cookie made with brown sugar, semi-sweet chocolate chips, and Chips Ahoy! cookie pieces, topped with creamy blue vanilla frosting and a mini Chips Ahoy! cookie.
- Brookie Cookie - A warm cookie that's a semi-sweet chocolate chip cookie on one half and a chocolate cookie on the other half.
- Raspberry Butter Cake Cookie - A warm butter cake cookie infused with raspberry, topped with a buttery glaze, raspberry topping, and white buttercream.
- Churro Cookie - A warm cinnamon cookie topped with cinnamon buttercream and a sprinkle of cinnamon sugar.
- Milk Chocolate Chip Cookie - A warm cookie packed with milk chocolate chips.
- Secret Menu - Crumbl continues to offer a "secret menu" cake or cookie that is determined by each location each week. You can find what's available near you by checking the Crumbl website or mobile app.
Photo via Crumbl.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Crumbl Bakes New Biscoff Pie and More Through October 11, 2025

articles.description:
Wienerschnitzel partners with the Golden West Food Group to bring its Corn Dogs to the frozen food aisle at over 500 grocery stores in California and Nevada starting this month.

Wienerschnitzel's grocery store Corn Dogs are available in two varieties: Original and Chili Cheese Flavored (a retail exclusive).
Grocery store chains carrying the corn dogs include Save Mart, FoodMaxx, Lucky, Albertsons, and Vons. They come in a 37.38-oz box containing 14 corn dogs.

Baskin-Robbins launches new Galactic Brownie ice cream as a limited-time flavor with a cosmic theme. It's joined by the new Galactic Brownie Polar Pizza.

You can get it by the scoop in a cup or cone or in any number of treats offered by the ice cream parlor chain, including in a milkshake or ice cream cake.
The Galactic Brownie Polar Pizza is positioned as a sweet, shareable dessert for Halloween, one of the busiest nights for pizza delivery. It features a double fudge brownie crust topped with Galactic Brownie ice cream, M&M's Milk Chocolate Candies, a drizzle of fudge, and Halloween-themed sprinkles.

articles.description:
Taco Bell's Chili Cheese Burrito features chili and shredded cheese wrapped up in a warm flour tortilla.

It cost me $2.99 for one.
I last had one of these over 10 years ago (i.e., the pre-quarter days), so I thought it'd be fun to see if anything has changed from what I remember.
When I previously reviewed the Chili Cheese Burrito, it was very liquid with a high potential of causing a mess. Fortunately, the years have been kind (or I was just lucky), and this particular Chili Cheese Burrito was less watery and didn't threaten to spill out with every bite I took.
Texture-wise, the chili is similar to Taco Bell's seasoned ground beef, only with more liquid. The cheese was thoroughly melted, and the flour tortilla was soft but sturdy.



As far as how it tastes, it's a pretty standard beef chili. It's enjoyable but not particularly outstanding. There's a tomato base with typical chili spices (garlic, onion, chili powder, etc.). There's just a bare hint of heat to it. It's joined by a bit of generic creaminess from the very mild cheese.
If you want a handheld chili, it's not a bad way to go and is certainly meatier than your typical Taco Bell fare. It's one of the rare Taco Bell savory menu items that doesn't taste like anything else on the menu. For the purposes of the review, I got it without any customizations, but I'd recommend adding onions (free at my local Taco Bell, but some locations charge for them) and getting it grilled for extra flavor and texture.
Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Chili Cheese Burrito
Calories - 380
Fat - 17g (Saturated Fat - 9g)
Sodium - 970mg
Carbs - 41g (Sugar - 2g)
Protein - 15g
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Re-Review: Taco Bell - Chili Cheese Burrito (2025)

- Thanksgiving Turkey Sub -  Carved turkey breast, savory stuffing, sweet cranberry sauce, and mayo, served hot on a toasted sub roll.
- New Gravy - A "rich, savory gravy with notes of garlic, roasted turkey, and vegetable stock." Firehouse Subs recommends dunking your sandwich in it.
- New Extra Cheesy Mac & Cheese - Cavatappi noodles with a creamy mix of American, cheddar, Neufchatel, Monterey Jack, Queso, and asadero cheeses.

The sub and new menu items are available now at participating restaurants nationwide.

The new chicken strips are described as "flavor-packed and savory, made with seasoned, crispy breading and juicy, all-white-meat chicken." The new dipping sauces include:


Wendy's Signature - A "creamy sauce with hints of black pepper, hot sauce, and tons of savory goodness."
Sweet Chili - A "Sweet and subtly spicy sauce with a touch of tang, including notes of sriracha, garlic, and ginger."
Scorchin' Hot - A "creamy hot sauce with a heat that builds."
Creamy Ranch - "Extra creamy and extra rich."
Honey BBQ - "A little bit sweet, a little bit smoky."
Honey Mustard - "Sweet honey and lightly tangy mustard with a rich Dijon flavor."


Wendy's Chicken Tenders are available now at locations nationwide. They can be purchased in three- or four-piece orders, which include two dipping sauces. Combo meals and a Kid's Meal (with two pieces and a dipping sauce) are also available.
Prices vary, but three tenders cost $5.39 at my local Wendy's in Los Angeles, while four tenders cost $7.19.
Wendy's has offered chicken tenders before. They were introduced in 2017 and discontinued in 2019.
Photo via Wendy's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
